title: A Simple Crafting Mod
description: This mod is for people who don't want to grind as much.
body:
Alright, this mod basically allows the player/s to craft uncraftable items. Thats it this is meant to be apart of modpacks and is not a good standalone mod. 
Examples of what the mod will allow you to craft:
All heads
Blaze Rods
Nether Star
Phantom Membrane
Enchanted Golden Apples
and more
